name: browzer
description: AI agent skills to empower it with Browzer — hybrid vector + Graph RAG for codebases and document workspaces. Twenty-three skills around the `browzer` CLI: RAG (embed-workspace-graphs, embed-documents, explore-workspace-graphs, semantic-search, dependency-graph, ingestion-jobs), workflow (generate-prd → generate-task → execute-task → update-docs → commit → sync-workspace), quality (brainstorming as step-0 preflight, test-driven-development, write-tests, verification-before-completion), orchestration (orchestrate-task-delivery), ops (auth-status, workspace-management), and tools (use-rag-cli, browzer-bootstraper, find-skills, architecture-blueprint-generator). Use for code search, doc Q&A, ingesting a repo into a vector + graph store, Graph RAG over Neo4j, and an end-to-end idea-to-merge dev workflow with brainstorming, TDD, mutation-aware test authoring, and blast-radius verification — all routed through the orchestrate-task-delivery meta-skill.

BROWZER_SERVER.title: Browzer server URL
BROWZER_SERVER.description: Base URL of the Browzer gateway (e.g. https://browzeremb.com or http://localhost:8080).

BROWZER_API_KEY.title: Browzer API key
BROWZER_API_KEY.description: Optional API key for non-interactive login. If unset, run `browzer login` once interactively.
